name: DYSEMBRYOPLASTIC NEUROEPITHELIAL TUMOR
definition: benign tumor of neuroepithelial origin arising from cortical / deep gray matter

demographics.Histo: specific glioneuronal element in a columnar pattern oriented perpendicular to cortical

distribution: cortical mass without surrounding vasogenic edema:
discriminating_features: remodeling of inner table of skull
cortical mass without surrounding vasogenic edema:
hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI
"soap bubble" / megagyrus appearance at cortical margin = enlargement of cortical

CT: remodeling of inner table of skull
MR: cortical mass without surrounding vasogenic edema:
hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI
"soap bubble" / megagyrus appearance at cortical margin = enlargement of cortical

clinical.Prognosis: partial resection stops seizure activity; rarely recurs
